sources.author: Nikolay Kovelin with AI assistance
sources.constraint: Portable roots only; no legacy host-directory assumptions.

sources.author: Nikolay Kovelin with AI assistance
sources.constraint: Only the marked PAI overlay block may be reused; bundled OMP profile text is excluded.

sources.author: Daniel Miessler and contributors
sources.strategy: Bundle a path-portable derivative as the clean-install default; preserve the MIT notice and track the exact derivative checksum.

sources.author: Daniel Miessler
sources.licenseEvidence: README badge says MIT; repository exposes no LICENSE file or license API entry
sources.strategy: Accept only an explicit existing local path override; never download or vendor automatically.

sources.source: newly authored empty schemas and starter records
sources.author: Nikolay Kovelin with AI assistance
sources.constraint: No personal values, contacts, host paths, or copied local TELOS records.

sources.author: local user
sources.strategy: Ship newly authored sanitized starter templates only.

sources.source: newly authored schemas, layout, and empty registries
sources.author: Nikolay Kovelin with AI assistance
sources.constraint: No runtime records, session history, traces, credentials, or copied local MEMORY state.

sources.author: local user and generated runtime state
sources.strategy: Ship newly authored schemas and empty state only; private export remains local.

releaseRule: Every staged file must map to a distributable source or be original package code.
